title.text: Average GPA by Year of Enrollment

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM enrollment_date)::INT AS enrollment_year,
       AVG(gpa) AS avg_gpa
FROM public.students
WHERE enrollment_date IS NOT NULL
  AND gpa IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM enrollment_date)::INT
ORDER BY enrollment_year ASC;

issues: X encoding uses type "ordinal" for enrollment_year — since this is a time series (year), use a temporal or quantitative type so the axis reflects numeric/temporal ordering and spacing.
Y scale sets "zero": false — omitting zero can exaggerate differences for average GPA (typically on a 0–4 scale); consider including zero or documenting why it's omitted.

title.text: Average GPA by Year of Enrollment

result.sql:
SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM enrollment_date)::INT AS enrollment_year,
       AVG(gpa) AS avg_gpa
FROM public.students
WHERE enrollment_date IS NOT NULL
  AND gpa IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM enrollment_date)::INT
ORDER BY enrollment_year ASC;

issues: X encoding uses type "ordinal" for enrollment_year — since this is a time series (year), use a temporal or quantitative type so the axis reflects numeric/temporal ordering and spacing.
Y scale sets "zero": false — omitting zero can exaggerate differences for average GPA (typically on a 0–4 scale); consider including zero or documenting why it's omitted.
